CVE-2022-4899.title: A vulnerability was found in zstd v1.4.10, where an attacker can  ...
CVE-2022-4899.description: A vulnerability was found in zstd v1.4.10, where an attacker can supply empty string as an argument to the command line tool to cause buffer overrun.
CVE-2022-4899.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.
